title: Charred Crispy Ethiopian Lentils Misir Wot
description: A lazy Sunday Ethiopian dish featuring charred lentils in a spicy Chinese sesame sauce, served in a donabe and grilled to perfection, this FODMAP friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large donabe, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in the berbere spice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the rinsed lentils and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Add the Chinese sesame sauce and stir to combine.
Transfer the donabe to the preheated grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the lentils are charred and crispy.
Remove the donabe from the grill and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
